channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump says Iran called to make a deal after U.S. strikes; adds it's unclear if war is back on
item.description: When asked whether the U.S. and Iran are returning to a full-scale military conflict, Trump responded: "I don't know."

item.title: Meet SK Hynix, the trillion-dollar South Korean chipmaker debuting on U.S. markets
item.description: Following a more than sevenfold rally in its stock price over the past year, South Korea's SK Hynix is listing on the Nasdaq.

item.title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as North American consumers tighten their budgets
item.description: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.

item.title: What AI companies want for the millions they're spending on elections
item.description: Lawmakers are working on AI legislation — and two major industry PACs are each pushing for their own version of regulation.

item.title: Jeep's parent stock has underperformed. JPMorgan doesn't see an improvement in the near future
item.description: The investment bank downgraded the automotive manufacturing name to neutral from overweight.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: AstraZeneca, PepsiCo, Salesforce, Levi & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

item.title: From 'dear Donald' to 'Trump trillion': Inside NATO chief Mark Rutte's U.S. strategy
item.description: NATO chief Mark Rutte lavished praise on U.S. President Donald Trump during a fractious summit in Turkey this week.

item.title: Ukraine’s drone playbook is wreaking havoc in Russia — and upending where NATO wants to invest
item.description: Ukraine’s deep drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping the war and pushing NATO toward a $40 billion counter-drone plan.

item.title: AstraZeneca stock drops 9% after heart drug trial miss deals rare blow to pharma powerhouse
item.description: A late-stage clinical trial failed to miss its primary endpoint, U.K.'s laregst drugmaker said Thursday.

item.title: Meta to put AI chip into production in September as it looks to double computing capacity, Reuters reports
item.description: Meta plans to start manufacturing an artificial intelligence chip from September as part of its plan to boost overall computing power, Reuters reports.

item.title: Fed officials were split on direction of interest rates at last meeting, minutes show
item.description: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its June 16-17 meeting.

item.title: Platner quits Maine Senate race; Democrats set to pick new nominee
item.description: Maine Democrats must now replace Platner with less than four months until the midterm elections.

item.title: Clean power comeback? Don't count out renewable energy and this one stock in particular
item.description: Clean power is responsible for roughly 90% of all new electrical capacity being added to the grid, according to the CEO of the American Clean Power Association.

item.title: Why the world’s best-performing stock market this year fell into bear territory
item.description: The Kospi fell more than 5% on Wednesday, which brought it 20% below its June 19 record high, according to LSEG data.

item.title: Trump announces long-shot bid to get Supreme Court to rehear birthright citizenship case
item.description: Trump already asked the Supreme Court to reconsider denying him an appeal of a verdict holding him liable for sexually abusing and defaming E. Jean Carroll.

item.title: Waymo to start driverless rides in 4 more U.S. markets as expansion accelerates
item.description: Waymo has a big lead in the nascent U.S. robotaxi market, and is opening up in more cities.

item.title: Meta is building its first big Canadian data center as AI expansion crosses the border
item.description: Meta is building its first big Canadian data center as AI expansion crosses the border.

item.title: SpaceX is racing toward orbital data centers. Here are ways to play this emerging technology
item.description: SpaceX’s push toward orbital data centers opens new avenues for AI infrastructure. Wall Street is already mapping the stocks that could benefit.

item.title: Levi Strauss beats quarterly expectations, raises guidance and dividend
item.description: Levi Strauss beat quarterly expectations on the top and bottom lines during its fiscal 2026 second quarter.

item.title: Few bright spots in Wednesday's tough market — why Nvidia stock is one of them
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: World Cup drives Google Search to record queries per second
item.description: The milestone comes amid Lionel Messi and Argentina's popularity.

item.title: Private student loans with rewards: These lenders offer cash back and discounts
item.description: Find out where student loan borrowers can earn cash back for getting good grades, graduating, paying on time and more.

item.title: Used EVs keep getting more expensive amid Iran war, high gas prices
item.description: The Manheim Used Vehicle Value Index for EVs — which tracks prices of used vehicles sold at its U.S. wholesale auctions — increased 12% compared to June 2025.

item.title: AirPods-maker Luxshare sees shares close lower in tepid Hong Kong debut
item.description: The company, which is already listed in Shenzhen, had priced shares in the IPO at 63.28 Hong Kong dollars apiece, raising HK$24.27 billion ($3.09 billion).

item.title: Jim Cramer sees a big risk to the bull market resurfacing — and it's not the Iran war
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance is the next big threat to the bull market.

item.title: Gas prices could rise as Iran conflict escalates—a 'budget reset' may help absorb the added cost, financial planners say
item.description: Renewed tensions with Iran could push gas prices higher. Here's how financial planners say to adjust your budget.

item.title: Crypto still 'off the table' for Singapore's Temasek, four years after FTX flop
item.description: Temasek's investment in the now-bankrupt FTX cryptocurrency exchange led to a writedown of $275 million in 2022, drawing much local criticism.

item.title: Trump's European allies add distance on Iran following testy NATO summit
item.description: President Donald Trump spent two days in Ankara, Turkey with other NATO member leaders.

item.title: SpaceX stock closes below debut price at $148 in two-day slide after Nasdaq-100 inclusion
item.description: SpaceX's record IPO raised a total of $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the "greenshoe" overallotment.

item.title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
item.description: Investors increasingly view China's two-speed growth with robust export and tepid domestic demand as a defining long-term feature of the Chinese economy.
